concerns.detail: Unsupported personal insult using derogatory term '垃圾人' (trash/garbage person).
Broad character attack asserting the subject is entirely dishonest without specific evidence in this clause.
concerns.excerpt: 满口谎言，没有一句实话

concerns.detail: Accusatory personal attack implying Chaowei Xiao is the one deleting content, used as an insult/threat.
